notes: agy runs a failing command, inspects the failure, retries with a corrected command, then replies — a single contiguous working span with no flicker to ready/waiting between the failed attempt and the recovery. Single-birth adapter (transcript-first, session id = <conv-id> dir). Each attempt: parsePlannerResponse WITH tool_calls → assistant_message + ToolUse (non-settling); parseToolResult → function_call_output, IsError set when 'The command failed' matches but STILL non-settling (turn stays working); there is no error/waiting settle path. Only the terminal empty PLANNER_RESPONSE → turn_done → ready. The no-flicker invariant is structural. Live samples 9ea5200c (bd ready→fail→git status→fail→retry) and 69343e3e (17+ self-correcting run_command cycles in one turn) confirm the agent loop. Tokens/cost not in the JSONL → observations assert tokens_nonzero:false, cost_nonzero:false; model omitted (provisional). INTERACTIVE driver required. driver=gap:wait_turn — record ports wait_turn (must NOT return on a mid-turn failing result) + the launch_repl session-resolution SEAM first.

text: antigravity session (<conv-id>) appears in ready when transcript.jsonl is written

Spec: state stays continuously working across the failed attempt and the corrected retry — the failing function_call_output (IsError) is non-settling, so NO flicker to ready or waiting between attempts
Terminal PLANNER_RESPONSE after the successful retry → turn_done → ready (final state ready)
